title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency · Extension Lens: Pagination Filtering
summary: Refine an MCP server whose tools are ambiguous and return too much data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext pagination filtering increment in an efficient tool API and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Provide filters, pagination, summaries, and stable identifiers for large result sets.
Return actionable domain errors without exposing secrets or stack internals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
